auth.label: Secret API Key
auth.description: Fidel API secret key used with the Fidel-Key header for read-only brands, cards, and transactions endpoints. Create or sign in to the Fidel dashboard to get your test or live secret key: https://dashboard.fidel.uk/sign-in

actions.name: get_brand
actions.description: Fetch one Fidel brand by brand ID.

brandId.description: The Fidel brand ID to fetch.

anyOf.description: The Fidel account ID that owns the brand.
The ISO timestamp when the brand was created.
The ISO timestamp when the brand was last updated.
The brand display name.
The optional metadata object returned by Fidel.
The brand logo URL when Fidel returned one.
Whether the brand belongs to the live environment.
Whether the brand requires cardholder consent.
The brand website URL when Fidel returned one.

brand.description: A Fidel brand record normalized by the connector.

resource.description: The Fidel API resource path that handled the request.

status.description: The upstream HTTP status code returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The upstream execution time in milliseconds when Fidel returned it.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result of fetching one Fidel brand.

actions.name: get_card
actions.description: Fetch one Fidel card by card ID.

cardId.description: The Fidel card ID to fetch.

anyOf.description: The Fidel account ID that owns the card.
The ISO alpha-3 country code for the card.
The ISO timestamp when the card was created.
The card expiration year.
The ISO date for the card expiration month.
Whether the card belongs to the live environment.
The last four card digits.
The card expiration month.
The ISO timestamp when the card was last updated.
The Fidel program ID that owns the card.
The first six card digits.
The card network reported by Fidel.
The card type reported by Fidel.

card.description: A Fidel card record normalized by the connector.

resource.description: The Fidel API resource path that handled the request.

status.description: The upstream HTTP status code returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The upstream execution time in milliseconds when Fidel returned it.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result of fetching one Fidel card.

actions.name: get_transaction
actions.description: Fetch one Fidel transaction by transaction ID.

transactionId.description: The Fidel transaction ID to fetch.

anyOf.description: The Fidel program ID that owns the transaction.
The Fidel account ID that owns the transaction.
The ISO timestamp when the transaction was created.
The ISO timestamp when the transaction was last updated.
The transaction amount.
The ISO currency code for the transaction.
The normalized authorization or approval code returned by Fidel.
Whether Fidel classified the event as an authorization.
Whether Fidel classified the event as cleared.
The optional wallet object returned by Fidel.
The optional offer object returned by Fidel.
The upstream transaction datetime string returned by Fidel.
The Fidel card ID.
The first six card digits.
The last four card digits.
The card network reported by Fidel.

card.description: The card snapshot nested inside a Fidel transaction.

anyOf.description: The Fidel location ID.
The location street address.
The location city.
The ISO alpha-3 country code for the location.
The latitude coordinate.
The longitude coordinate.
The optional latitude and longitude returned by Fidel for this location.
The location postal code.
The location state or region field returned by Fidel.
The IANA timezone for the location.
The optional metadata object returned by Fidel.

location.description: The location snapshot nested inside a Fidel transaction.

anyOf.description: The Fidel brand ID.
The brand name.
The brand logo URL when Fidel returned one.
The optional metadata object returned by Fidel.

brand.description: The brand snapshot nested inside a Fidel transaction.

anyOf.description: The American Express approval code when Fidel returned one.
The Mastercard authorization code when Fidel returned one.
The Mastercard reference number when Fidel returned one.
The Mastercard transaction sequence number when Fidel returned one.
The merchant identifier returned by Fidel.
The Visa authorization code when Fidel returned one.

identifiers.description: Network-specific identifiers returned by Fidel for a transaction.

anyOf.description: Whether Fidel marked the transaction as card present.

transaction.description: A Fidel transaction record normalized by the connector.

resource.description: The Fidel API resource path that handled the request.

status.description: The upstream HTTP status code returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The upstream execution time in milliseconds when Fidel returned it.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result of fetching one Fidel transaction.

actions.name: list_brands
actions.description: List Fidel brands available to the connected secret API key.

limit.description: The maximum number of brands to return.

start.description: The opaque cursor string returned as nextCursor by a previous Fidel list action. Pass it back unchanged.

order.description: Sort order for the upstream created or datetime field.

inputSchema.description: Optional filters for listing Fidel brands.

count.description: The number of brands returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The Fidel account ID that owns the brand.
The ISO timestamp when the brand was created.
The ISO timestamp when the brand was last updated.
The brand display name.
The optional metadata object returned by Fidel.
The brand logo URL when Fidel returned one.
Whether the brand belongs to the live environment.
Whether the brand requires cardholder consent.
The brand website URL when Fidel returned one.

items.description: A Fidel brand record normalized by the connector.

brands.description: The brand records returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The cursor string to pass back as start in the next list_brands call, or null when absent.

resource.description: The Fidel API resource path that handled the request.

status.description: The upstream HTTP status code returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The upstream execution time in milliseconds when Fidel returned it.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result of listing Fidel brands.

limit.description: The maximum number of cards to return.

start.description: The opaque cursor string returned as nextCursor by a previous Fidel list action. Pass it back unchanged.

order.description: Sort order for the upstream created or datetime field.

count.description: The number of cards returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The Fidel account ID that owns the card.
The ISO alpha-3 country code for the card.
The ISO timestamp when the card was created.
The card expiration year.
The ISO date for the card expiration month.
Whether the card belongs to the live environment.
The last four card digits.
The card expiration month.
The ISO timestamp when the card was last updated.
The Fidel program ID that owns the card.
The first six card digits.
The card network reported by Fidel.
The card type reported by Fidel.

items.description: A Fidel card record normalized by the connector.

cards.description: The card records returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The cursor string to pass back as start in the next list_cards call, or null when absent.

resource.description: The Fidel API resource path that handled the request.

status.description: The upstream HTTP status code returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The upstream execution time in milliseconds when Fidel returned it.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result of listing Fidel cards.

order.description: Sort order for the upstream created or datetime field.

from.description: The inclusive starting ISO date-time filter.

to.description: The inclusive ending ISO date-time filter.

count.description: The number of transactions returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The Fidel program ID that owns the transaction.
The Fidel account ID that owns the transaction.

The ISO timestamp when the transaction was last updated.
The transaction amount.

The optional offer object returned by Fidel.
The upstream transaction datetime string returned by Fidel.
The Fidel card ID.
The first six card digits.
The last four card digits.
The card network reported by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The Fidel location ID.
The location street address.

The optional latitude and longitude returned by Fidel for this location.
The location postal code.

anyOf.description: The Fidel brand ID.

anyOf.description: The American Express approval code when Fidel returned one.

The Mastercard reference number when Fidel returned one.
The Mastercard transaction sequence number when Fidel returned one.

identifiers.description: Network-specific identifiers returned by Fidel for a transaction.

anyOf.description: Whether Fidel marked the transaction as card present.

items.description: A Fidel transaction record normalized by the connector.

transactions.description: The transaction records returned by Fidel.

anyOf.description: The cursor string to pass back as start in the next list_transactions call, or null when absent.

resource.description: The Fidel API resource path that handled the request.

status.description: The upstream HTTP status code returned by Fidel.
